title: allantodia hirtipes
intro: Allantodia hirtipes is a species of fern, a type of vascular plant that belongs to the family Athyriaceae. The plant is traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiviral effects. It is believed to offer health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. The herbal preparations of Allantodia hirtipes are typically made from its leaves, which can be dried, crushed, and brewed into a tea or used as a decoction for medicinal purposes.
